rationale: The cited paper’s core mechanism—compensatory inferences that downgrade an observably superior option on an unobservable attribute—closely aligns with the citing paper’s focal phenomenon of “complicating” choice by overweighting disadvantages of superior options and even reversing preference ordering. Given this strong construct-level overlap in the notes (despite only a single DOI-matched reference and no local citation context), this is not safely an obvious incidental mention.
